overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring rural Japanese farmland. The character traverses blooming yellow flower fields, crosses a wooden footbridge, and walks through flooded rice paddies where farmers work in the misty morning atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path through yellow flower fields

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall yellow flowers on both sides

entered.detail: dense field of blooming yellow rapeseed flowers stretching to the horizon
dense field of blooming yellow rapeseed flowers stretching to the horizon
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the flower fields
simple wooden stakes marking the boundary of the field
dense misty forest forming the backdrop beyond the fields

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through expansive fields of yellow flowers under an overcast misty sky. Wooden fence posts line the right side while a dense forest looms in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden footbridge crossing over irrigation channel

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending wooden stairs of the footbridge
character descends from bridge onto rocky terrain beyond the flower fields

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs to cross the footbridge then descending onto rocky ground on the far side

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge with railings crossing over a water channel
weathered wooden steps leading up to the bridge deck
uneven rocky ground with patches of grass and small boulders

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the flower fields behind to climb a wooden footbridge with stairs, crossing over an irrigation channel. After descending on the far side, the terrain shifts to rocky ground with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded rice paddy fields with stone terraces

events.description: character steps from rocky path into the shallow water of flooded rice paddies
passing by NPC farmers working and tending to rice plants in the paddy

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water of rice paddies toward a wooden farm building in the distance

notable_agents.action: farmer bending over planting or tending rice seedlings in the paddy water

entered.detail: flooded agricultural field with young green rice shoots planted in rows
flooded agricultural field with young green rice shoots planted in rows
low stone terrace wall separating different levels of paddy fields
small traditional wooden structure with a thatched roof among the fields

segments.scene_description: The character enters the flooded rice paddy fields, walking through shallow water between rows of young rice plants. Farmers work in the fields nearby, and a traditional wooden hut sits against a stone terrace wall in the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural landscape that transforms from vibrant flower fields into misty, flooded rice paddies. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by expansive yellow flowers and wooden fence posts under an overcast sky. As the path ends, the camera follows the character up and over a wooden footbridge crossing an irrigation channel, descending onto rocky ground with sparse vegetation. The scene then shifts as the character enters shallow water, wading through rows of young rice plants in a flooded paddy. Finally, the view expands to reveal farmers working nearby and a traditional wooden hut nestled against a stone terrace wall in the distant mist.
